map_coverage: {done} ye {total} maguta akaongororwa kusvika zvino - mamwe anowedzerwa zuva nezuva.
cur_so_far: {year} kusvika zvino (kusvika {day} {month}): {v} °C paavhareji, {d} °C vs iyo 1961-1990 zvinoreva mazuva mamwe chete egore.
cmp_hint: Imwe neimwe curve iguta iro repagore anomaly vs iro rayo 1961-1990 baseline, saka nzvimbo dzine mamiriro ekunze akasiyana anoenzanisa zvakaringana.
sum_season: Mwaka wekudziya zvakanyanya pano: {season} ({v} °C pamakore gumi).
sum_month: Mwedzi unokurumidza kudziya pano: {month} ({v} °C pamakore gumi).
grid_alias_note: Iyo tembiricha rekodhi inoverengerwa pa ~ 11 km mamiriro ekunze-data grid cell. {alias} inogovera sero yayo ne {city}, saka ese ari maviri anoratidza yakafanana 1940-yazvino nhoroondo.
guide_body:
• Dots / mbariro: kukosha kwegore rega rega.
  • Bold colored curve: a LOESS inotsvedzerera: maitiro emunharaunda, akasununguka kukotama, saka iwe unogona kuona chiyero chekuchinja nekufamba kwenguva (semuenzaniso kudziya kunowedzera mushure ~1985).
  • Dashed line: iyo yakatwasuka yakasimba (Theil-Sen) maitiro; mutsetse wayo ndiwo mufananidzo we "pamakore gumi" mungano.
  • p<0.05 / n.s.: Mann-Kendall kukosha: ingave maitiro acho ari echokwadi kana anogona kungova ruzha (n.s. = haina kukosha). Tembiricha inowanzokosha zvakanyanya; mvura zhinji haina kunaya.
  • Shaded band: nhoroondo yakazara mumakore ese emwedzi iwoyo.
  • Heatmap mavara: tembiricha (blue kutonhora → tsvuku inodziya); verenga chikamu kubva pasi kusvika kumusoro kuti uone mwedzi iwoyo uchichinja nekufamba kwemakore.
subtitle: {start}-{end} · {days} mazuva · inodziya zvakanyanya {wy} ({wv:.1f} °C), inotonhora {cy} ({cv:.1f} °C)
analog_line: Pakazosvika 2050, mamiriro ekunze enzvimbo aikwanisa kunzwa sezvakaita {analog} nhasi, nezve +{d} °C kudziya.
analog_past: Muna 1940, mamiriro ekunze enzvimbo ainzwa kunge {analog} nhasi, anenge {d} °C kutonhorera.
cap_yearly: Zvinoreva gore negore neLOESS yakatsetseka (inoratidza kukurumidza) uye yakasimba Theil-Sen maitiro +kukosha
cap_anomalies: Gore rega rega tichienzanisa neavhareji ye1961-1990: mabhawa matsvuku anodziya, bhuruu inotonhorera. Kuchinja kubva pakunyanya bhuruu kuenda kutsvuku ndiko kudziya.
cap_heatmap: Avhareji yemwedzi wega wega pagore rega rega segridi yemavara (2 °C mabhendi). Verenga chikamu kumusoro kuti uone mwedzi iwoyo uchidziya kwemakumi emakore.
cap_anom_heatmap: Same grid, asi mwedzi wega wega inoyerwa inopesana neyayo 1961-1990 yakajairwa, saka chete shanduko inoratidza (yakatsvuka inodziya kupfuura yakajairwa, yebhuruu inotonhorera), kutenderera kwemwaka kunobviswa.
cap_threshold: Mazuva gore negore pamusoro pe18 °C (inopisa) uye pasi pe0 °C (inotonhora). Iwo maviri akasimba maitiro ekuyambuka zvinoreva mazuva anopisa ave kupfuura mazuva ekutonhora.
hint: Dzvanya chero kupi kana kudzvanya Esc kuvhara
intro: Kudziya kwakaita maguta makuru epasi kubva 1940: tembiricha yemazuva ese kubva kuERA5 yekuongorora mamiriro ekunze.
map_sub: Sarudza guta pamepu kana kubva pane rondedzero
omni_ph: Tsvaga guta, nyika, dunhu kana chero nzvimbo
cap_range: Mwedzi wega wega min-max range nekufamba kwemakore, negore razvino. Kumbundirana kunodziya here?
record_title: Mwedzi rekodhi yakakwirira / yakaderera tembiricha yezuva nezuva, {name}
cap_records: Mwedzi wega wega rekodhi renguva dzose zuva nezuva kumusoro uye pasi, nekunyanyisa kwegore razvino
cap_volatility: Kangani kusvetuka kukuru kwezuva nezuva kunoitika gore rega rega (≥6 °C), kusiyanisa kwekushisa
cap_precip: Kunaya kwegore rose kwemvura (mvura yekunaya uye yechando) ine maitiro
cap_stripes: Mutsetse wega wega tembiricha yegore rimwe: bhuruu inotonhorera, tsvuku inodziya kupfuura avhareji ya1961-1990. Kunyura kubva kubhuruu kuenda kutsvuku ndiko kudziya, pasina chekuverenga kunze kweruvara.
cap_season: Kureba kwemwaka wekupisa wekupisa gore rega rega (kumhanya kwemazuva ane zvinoreva zuva nezuva ≥ 5 °C): kurima kwemahwindo kusina chando kunoenderana, kurebesa sezvo mamiriro ekunze anodziya.
cap_dtr: Avhareji gapu pakati pezuva rega rega repamusoro nepasi. A shrinking range is a greenhouse fingerprint: husiku hunodziya nekukurumidza kupfuura mazuva; kuwedzera kunogona kuratidza kuoma.
cap_seasonshift: Avhareji yegore rekutanga vs. gumi rekupedzisira rekodhi. Mukaha uripo pakati pemacurves pamwedzi wega wega unoratidza kuti ndezvipi zvikamu zvegore zvinodziya zvakanyanya (kazhinji nguva yechando inodarika zhizha).
health_sub: Mafambisirwo ekudziya ari pamusoro anoshandura kuita zvinozivikanwa kupisa-, kutonhora- uye zvakanyanya-zviitiko zvekusangana metrics. Chati yega yega inoonekwa painoda data iripo.
cap_degreedays: Mutoro wepagore wekupisa-kunyaradza: kudiwa kwekudziya (pasi pe18 °C) kunodonha apo kutonhora kunodiwa (pamusoro pe22 °C) kunokwira, proxy yekuratidzira kutonhora uye kudiwa kwemhepo-inotonhorera.
cap_heatwave: Mazuva ari mumhepo inopisa: kumhanya kwemazuva ≥3 nepamusoro pezuva nezuva pamusoro pemunharaunda 1961-1990 90th percentile. Kupisa kwakasimba kwemasikati ndiko kunonyanya kufambisa kufa kweheat-wave.
cap_tropic: Husiku apo kudzikira kunogara kana pamusoro pe20 °C, saka muviri hauwane zororo rehusiku humwe, mutyairi anotungamira, kazhinji-asingatarisirwi werufu runoenderana nekupisa.
cap_coldspell: Mazuva muchando chinotonhora: kumhanya kwe ≥3 mazuva nekuderera kwezuva nezuva pasi pemunharaunda 1961-1990 10th percentile. Kutonhora kwenguva refu kunofambisa nguva yechando yemwoyo uye kufema kufa kwakanyanya.
cap_heavyrain: Mazuva ane kanenge 20 mm yemvura (ETCCDI R20mm), mafashamo anokonzera mafashamo anounza kukuvara, kutamiswa uye zvirwere zvinokonzerwa nemvura.
cap_heatindex: Mazuva anotaridzika tembiricha (inopisa indekisi, iyo inopeta mukunyorova) inosvika pakupisa-kushushikana mazinga, iyo metric yeruzhinji kupisa mazano anoshandisa. Inoda iyo inooneka-tembiricha dataset.
footer: Yakagadzirwa {date} · data kubva Open-Meteo nhoroondo reanalysis (ERA5) · source paGitHub
qv_baseline: Makumi emakore avhareji vs iyo 1961-1990 yekutanga
